questions.question: Prove that ¬(p ∧ q) is logically equivalent to (¬p ∨ ¬q) using the laws of logic.
Which of the following statements is an example of the law of excluded middle: p ∨ ¬p?
Using the commutative and associative laws of conjunction, prove that (p ∧ q) ∧ r is logically equivalent to p ∧ (q ∧ r).
questions.hint: Use the laws of logic to simplify the expression
